small.name: Typical workplace child care center
small.notes: ~100 children at 75 SF/child interior plus support and play yard

medium.name: Federal office child care center
medium.notes: Multiple age groups; kitchen; multipurpose; outdoor play

large.name: Campus early learning center
large.notes: Expanded gross motor and support areas

space_library.name: Entry / Parent Check-In
notes: Parent check-in, stroller parking, and visitor control at front entry.

space_library.name: Classroom / Activity Room
notes: GSA child care guidance uses 75 SF interior area per child for total center sizing and requires sinks/toilet/diapering accessible within the classroom.

space_library.name: Classroom Toilet / Diapering
notes: Accessible sinks/toilet/diapering within or directly off classroom are a core GSA requirement.

space_library.name: Nap / Quiet Zone
notes: GSA favors supervisable nap areas rather than isolated nap rooms.

space_library.name: Multipurpose / Gross Motor Room
notes: Guide calls for a multipurpose room accommodating the largest classroom, with flexible activity use.

space_library.name: Outdoor Play Yard
notes: GSA requires outdoor play area of at least 75 SF for half the center capacity and recommends age-separated play areas; classroom access to play yard should be within 100 ft.

space_library.name: Kitchen / Food Prep
notes: Baseline GSA facility contains an in-house preparation kitchen with heavy-duty equipment and cooking staff.

space_library.name: Staff Lounge / Workroom
notes: Staff workspace, lockers, and respite improve retention and supervision quality.

space_library.name: Storage / Cubbies / Supplies
notes: Toys, cots, classroom materials, and janitorial support.

space_library.name: Service / Receiving
notes: Deliveries, stroller overflow, refuse, and controlled access to support functions.

envelope_assembly.wall: insulated stud or CMU with durable interior finishes
envelope_assembly.glazing: low-e insulated glazing with child-safe sill strategy

plan_archetypes.notes: Direct classroom-to-play-yard access is high value.
